channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A position for M/M is available on an OIL/CHEMICAL TANKER. The contract duration is 4 months. Salary offered is 2800 EUR per month. Joining is ASAP. An EU passport or Schengen visa is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] M/M Job on Oil/Chemical Tanker at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location: World Wide
Description:

A Chief Officer and an ETO are sought for a VLGC vessel with worldwide trading. Joining is expected in June for a 3+-1 month rotation. Previous experience on LPG vessels in rank is mandatory, along with valid STCW certificates and EU citizenship or residence. Salary offered is from $13,250 for the Chief Officer and from $8,300 for the ETO.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer, ETO Vacancy on VLGC Vessel at LAPA LTD

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

Motorman and Ordinary Seaman positions are available on an Oil/Chemical Tanker with a deadweight of 11,500 tons, trading in Europe. Joining dates are June 10th and June 20th, respectively. The contract duration is 8 weeks plus or minus 2 weeks. A salary of 2481 EURO plus overtime for Motorman and 2171 EURO plus overtime for OS is offered. Experience on oil/chemical tankers, valid STCW certificates, and EU citizenship are mandatory.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Motorman, OS Jobs on Oil/Chemical Tanker at LAPA LTD

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced officers are sought for an LPG fleet with a leading ship ownership company. Positions include Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, and ETO. Joining is scheduled for mid-August. Applicants require a minimum of six months' rank experience on an LPG vessel. This role offers a professional, safety-driven environment with global career opportunities and long-term growth.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LPG Fleet Officers: Master, Chief Officer, Engineer, ETO Jobs at GMOS WORLD

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Multiple crew positions are available on an Oil/Chemical Tanker (GRT 5,999) requiring Indonesian seafarers. Openings include Master, Chief Officer, 2nd Officer, 3rd Officer, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer, 3rd Engineer, Bosun, Assistant Bosun, Able Seaman, Oiler, and Cook. Specific class and salary ranges are provided for each role. Interested candidates should submit their updated CV.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Vacancies on Oil Chemical Tanker at PT JAWARA LINTAS SEMESTA

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced seafarers are sought to join a growing fleet of LPG carriers and oil/chemical tankers. This is an opportunity to embark on a new contract. Specific roles and requirements are not detailed, but a strong commitment to maritime careers is expected.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Seafarer Jobs on LPG Chemical Tankers at Tangar Ship Management Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chief Engineers and Second Engineers with 12-36 months in rank and mandatory LNG/XDF experience are sought for urgent joining on an LNG vessel. This role offers competitive wages and clear career progression. All nationalities are welcome.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief and 2nd Engineer Job on LNG Vessel at Bernhard Schulte Shipmanagement

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chemical Tanker crew are sought for immediate joining. This role offers world-class perks including a rejoining bonus for officers, pension funds, health insurance, onboard internet, and gym equipment. Apply online or submit your CV via email for consideration.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chemical Tanker Crew Vacancies Available at Elburg Shipmanagement Philippines Inc.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer and Second Engineer are sought for an Oil/Chem Tanker (GRT 5,500). Salaries offered are USD 4,000 for Chief Officer and Second Engineer, USD 1,000 for Junior Officer, USD 2,000 for Third Engineer, and USD 500-700 for Able Seaman and Oiler. Tanker experience is mandatory, and Honduras CoC is accepted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer and Engineer Jobs on Oil Chem Tanker at Oceanic Star Shipping Pvt Ltd.

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available on a tanker operating under a Saudi Aramco project. Seeking experienced Chief Engineers, Second Officers, Crane Operators, Able Seamen (AB), and Oilers. Minimum experience requirements vary by rank, with specific COC and certificate validity needed. Contract duration is 3 months ON/OFF Unpaid or 180 days ON/OFF Unpaid. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance, or ASAP. Salary is to be discussed. Candidates must have a passport valid for at least one year and all relevant certificates valid for at least 12 months. No GCC visit/resident visas are permitted.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Positions on Tanker - Saudi Aramco Project at Aavishka
